title: Opening for Software Engineer at Apollo Telehealth Capital India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Apollo Telehealth Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Apollo Telehealth Capital India family as a Software Engineer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!
